title: Inbound Like + Undo Like activities
description: Handle inbound Like activities targeting local posts (create a favourites row, create a favourite notification for the post author). Handle inbound Undo{Like} (remove the favourites row). Like count visible in GET /api/v1/statuses/:id via COUNT of favourites.
design: Like.object is the local post URI. Verify the local post exists. Create favourites row with remote_account_id. Create notification of kind=favourite for the post's account_id. Undo matches by remote_account_id + post_id.
acceptance_criteria: Remote actor likes local post; post author gets favourite notification; favourites_count increments in status response; Undo Like removes the row and decrements count
